details.title: \textbf{Agentic Wrapper}
descriptions: Architeched the Ai layers of the product from scratch to enable the agentic ai to make data driven decisions Leading to ai native approach in the product.
Introduced RAG layer over more then \textbf{20K+} Financial Document to Stream line the agentic hand that empowered the brokers to make data driven decisions.
details.languages: Stack:- Prompt Engineering, RAG, Agentic toolkits, Gemini, Grok, Langchain
details.effect: Agentic AI makes data driven decisions leads to revenue increase in \$\textbf{100K+} dollars
details.scale: \textbf{100K} Real Estate Companies with segmented AI knowledge base of \textbf{Millions} of data points.

details.title: \textbf{Outreach Funnel}
descriptions: Invented the reachout funnel that lead the engagement rates to \textbf{10x} deals a month from quality leads through niched AI powered outreach with filterd Deals.
Redesined the context engineering approach to the data enrichment pipeline to make it more qualitative to use down funneling the leads to reachout.
details.languages: Stack:- SmartLead, Amazon SES, Playwright, Puppeteer
details.effect: Increased engagement rates by \textbf{10x} moving the Deal approach numbers once a month to double digits.
details.scale: Reachout to \textbf{10K+} leads a month from a Growing pool of \textbf{500K+} leads auto added from Real Life Newsletters

details.title: \textbf{Lead Management System}
descriptions: Added Broker Velocity Engine to gamify Brokers experienece where they do more in less time and get more deals with AI assistance and less repetative tasks.
details.languages: Stack:- Data Modeling, ETL, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ
details.effect: Gamification attacts intelligent brokers leading to more revenue
details.scale: 10+ brokers managing 1000+ deals and \$\textbf{100K+} in revenue for \textbf{20K+} properties.

stack: Stack:- Scala, Java, SQL, Spark, Kafka, PySpark, Hdfs

details.title: \textbf{DANTE (Data Anomaly Tracker)}
descriptions: Conceptualized our first configurable data quality tools which fortified data integrity and optimized parallel data reading, leading to a \textbf{60\%} reduction in data (\textbf{>100GB}) processing time, .
EQ Tracer: A tool to monitor summative metric trends across configurable hierarchies with dynamic alerting mechanisms to filter out noise data, ensuring accurate insights.
Ratio Tracer: A tool for outlier detection using customizable percentile thresholds, enabling the proactive identification and mitigation of anomalies.
PM Tracer: A logging and monitoring tool that aggregates data from multiple sources, providing detailed coverage and mismatch analysis for enhanced data quality and system reliability.
details.scale: Comparing between nearly \textbf{3 Billion} and \textbf{200 Million} Rows in \textbf{30 minutes}

details.title: \textbf{StopLoss System}
descriptions: Shifted Spark Streaming to Structured Streaming, leading to a \textbf{50\%} reduction in latency and improved error handling, which also added exactly-once assurance that terminated the data audit pipeline.

Implemented \textbf{A/B testing} to gain insights into traffic patterns and loss thresholds for individual entities. This initiative led to a remarkable \textbf{15\%} reduction in overall losses, significantly contributing to the company’s research and development efforts and generating tangible improvements in profitability.
details.languages: Stack:- Java, Structured Streaming, Batch Processing
details.scale: Fetching \textbf{50k records per second} from Kafka and processing it in \textbf{5 minute} bucket

stack: Stack:- Ruby on Rails, Python, Redis, Amazon SQS

details.title: \textbf{Discord Automation and Notification System}
descriptions: Pioneered automation for group moderation on Discord through website, unlocking the peer-learning aspect of the product. Resulted in reduced management costs with increased community engagement.

Developed an orchestrator for Spark submissions and PySpark scripts, dynamically fetching configurations from MySQL. This centralizes and tracks job configurations while providing data for performance monitoring.
details.languages: Stack:- Ruby on Rails, Python, Amazon SQS
details.scale: Sending \textbf{2k messages per day}. Reaching \textbf{10k Users} in \textbf{3 months}
